svg.title: Decision tree structure diagram
svg.desc: A decision tree showing a root node splitting into internal nodes and leaf nodes across three levels

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a root node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is an internal node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is an internal node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is a leaf node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is a leaf node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is a leaf node in a decision tree?')
sendPrompt('What is a leaf node in a decision tree?')
